name: Crispy Chicken Drumsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse chicken with cold water and pat dry.
2. Combine breadcrumbs and other ingredients (except milk), stirring well.
3. Dip drumsticks in skim milk.
4. Dredge in breadcrumb mixture, coating well.
5. Place drumsticks in a 10x6x2-inch baking dish sprayed with Pam.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until tender.
Note: Per Serving: 286 calories, 37.3g protein, 8.7g fat, 13.4g carbohydrate, 110g cholesterol, 2.1mg iron, 343mg sodium, 135mg calcium.
